props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how this option will be announced by screen readers.

props.name: compact
props.description: Reduces spacing for dense layouts.

props.name: description
props.description: Additional description text displayed below the label.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables this radio option. Also disabled if the parent RadioGroup is disabled.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state on this radio option.

props.name: label
props.description: The display label for this radio option. Falls back to value if not provided.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of this radio item.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the radio group. Inherited from the parent RadioGroup if not set.

props.name: revealAriaLabel
props.description: Text announced by screen readers when the reveal content is displayed.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of this radio option. Will be emitted when selected.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Additional description text displayed below the label.

slots.name: reveal
slots.description: Content revealed below the radio option when it is selected.

props.description: Sets the maximum width of this radio item.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the radio group. Inherited from the parent RadioGroup if not set.

props.name: revealAriaLabel
props.description: Text announced by screen readers when the reveal slot content is displayed.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of this radio option. Will be emitted when selected.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Additional description text displayed below the label.

slots.name: reveal
slots.description: Content revealed below the radio option when it is selected.
